items.title: Privacy First

vip.name: VIP

about.title: A curated private network for professionals and entrepreneurs.
about.paragraph1: KCLUB connects members with trusted businesses, practical membership tools, and a private path into cross-border relationships.
about.paragraph2: The platform keeps access focused: verified members, moderated partners, digital cards, and clear VIP pathways.

items.quote: KCLUB gives our team a quieter way to meet vetted partners without opening the door to random outreach.
items.author: Anna V.

items.quote: The directory is practical. I can verify a partner and move the conversation forward with confidence.
items.author: Michael R.

items.quote: The introductions feel human, focused, and respectful of privacy.
items.author: Olena K.

items.question: How do I join KCLUB?
items.answer: Start with sign-up, verify your phone by OTP, complete onboarding, and receive your digital member card.

items.question: What is VIP membership?
items.answer: VIP unlocks paid membership capabilities, business profile submission, and future introduction workflows for published businesses.

items.question: How does the QR card work?
items.answer: Each active card links directly to a public verification page that confirms card status without exposing private member data.

items.question: Which countries are supported?
items.answer: The DEV home uses placeholder coverage across 12 countries while the directory data layer is completed.

items.question: Is member lookup public?
items.answer: No. KCLUB does not provide arbitrary public member lookup. Verification happens through direct card URLs.

items.question: How does Stripe billing work?
items.answer: VIP and business placement billing will use Stripe Checkout, subscriptions, and customer portal flows.

cta.title: Ready to Join?
cta.subline: Create your member account and start with a verified digital club card.

footer.aboutText: KCLUB is a private membership platform for verified members, VIP access, and partner discovery.
